productDisplayName: Fila Men Motor Sports Black Red Sandal
description: Designed for utmost comfort, this pair of sandals from fila have all that the feet require. With cushioned, adjustable straps and multi-directional lugs on the outsole, this pair offers ample comfort and stability. This black and red pair comes from the Motor Sports range of fila. Pair them with casual wear like jeans, cargo pants or shorts and spend the summer in the glory of comfort in style.Upper Cushioned synthetic uppers with motors sport inspired elements designed to match the anatomical structure of the foot for support and durability Adjustable velcro strap at forefoot and front of the ankle lined with synthetic tape on the outside Plastic insertion buckle on the ankle strap Cushioned back strap Midsole Breathable EVA footbed for cushioning and shock resistance Embossed Fila branding all over the length of the footbed Outsole Made of lightweight Thermo Plastic Rubber (TPR) for extra durability, weather resistance and excellent abrasion resistance Multi-directional lugs for stability and grip Midfoot stabilizer running all along the forefoot to the heel counter for added stability and comfort Impact guidance system all along the outsole for added stability and comfort Fila branding on heel Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
